src: Soft, plush pink dice with black dots representing numbers, tied together with a white string. Each die is a perfect cube with smooth, fuzzy texture, and clear dot markings.
edit: Carved wooden dice with indented black dots, displaying number values. Each die is a polished cube, slightly rough in texture, showcasing wood grain patterns and natural color variations.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object rests on a bicycle seat with shiny handlebars. The background features a silver bike rack against a light gray concrete wall, casting distinct shadows on the ground.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is placed on a white ledge against a plain, light-colored wall indoors. The setting is minimal with no additional elements, focusing solely on the ledge and wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is positioned on a blue metal bench under sunlight. The shadows create striped patterns across the bench slats, with a concrete walkway visible in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object sits on a brick ledge beneath a greenish window frame. The setting includes gray-brown bricks and a glimpse of window reflections, adding urban architectural elements.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object lies on a rough, light gray stone surface, accompanied by dark soil and green shrubbery. The natural outdoor setting highlights a contrast between textured stone and foliage.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object is set on a red rectangular surface with grassy areas and modern buildings in the surround. The scene includes sidewalks and lush trees under a clear sky.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object is located on a smooth gray desk beside a computer keyboard and monitor cables. Sunlight creates soft highlights and shadows, revealing slight reflections on the surface.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The object is placed on a circular metal table with a brushed surface in an indoor setting. The neutral background consists of a plain wall with soft lighting.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object rests on a bicycle seat with shiny handlebars. Intricately frosted patterns on the silver bike rack evoke a winter setting, against the backdrop of a light gray concrete wall.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is placed on a white ledge against a plain, light-colored wall indoors, embellished with subtle icy textures hinting at a winter atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is positioned on a snow-dusted blue metal bench, casting striped shadow patterns. The concrete walkway is lightly frosted, reflecting a chilly winter scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object sits on a brick ledge beneath a greenish window frame. The bricks are dusted with frost, while the window has a thin layer of ice, enhancing the winter look.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object lies on a frosty, light gray stone surface, surrounded by snowy soil and wilted shrubbery, capturing a wintry outdoor setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object is set on a red rectangular surface with a lightly snow-covered grassy area and modern buildings in wintry guise, including bare trees and icy sidewalks.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object is located on a smooth gray desk inside, now showing light frost residue alongside the computer keyboard and monitor cables for a winter effect.
per_image_non_shared_edit.7: The object is placed on a circular metal table, now coated with a thin layer of frost in an indoor setting, adding a hint of winter to the metallic surface.
